title: Why Raymond James Financial Stock Soared 18.4% This Week
text: The financial services firm posted record revenue in its fiscal fourth quarter

title: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (RJF) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE:RJF ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 8:15 AM ET Company Participants Kristie Waugh - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations Paul Reilly - Chair and CEO Paul Shoukry - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Manan Gosalia - Morgan Stanley Gerry O'Hara - Jefferies Alex Blostein - Goldman Sachs Steven Chubak - Wolfe Research Jim Mitchell - Seaport Global Devin Ryan - JMP Securities Kyle Voigt - KBW Michael Kelly - Credit Suisse Operator Good morning. And welcome to Raymond James Financials Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2022 Earnings Call.

title: Raymond James (RJF) Q4 Earnings Top Estimates on Solid NII Rise
text: Robust NII improvement on rising rates and higher loan demand support Raymond James' (RJF) fiscal Q4 earnings.

title: Weak Investment Banking to Hurt Raymond James (RJF) Q4 Earnings
text: Subdued IB performance, rise in provisions and higher expenses are expected to have hurt Raymond James' (RJF) fiscal Q4 earnings.

title: These Are Glenn Greenberg's Top 10 Holdings
text: Born in New York in 1947, Glenn Greenberg is the son of baseball player Hank Greenberg.
